title: Connecting Wireframes to UX Goals
description: A flowchart illustrating how different types of wireframes serve specific UX goals throughout the design process.
relationships: Low-Fidelity Wireframes are created to validate Structure & Flow goals with stakeholders
Mid-Fidelity Wireframes are used to refine Usability & Clarity goals through internal review
High-Fidelity Wireframes are developed to finalize Interaction & Detail goals for the development team and user testing
